channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Friday, June 12, 2026
item.description: Today's most actionable thread for you runs through AI and higher ed simultaneously: Nature Medicine just published that general-purpose frontier LLMs are outperforming specialised clinical AI tools — a finding that directly reinforces your positioning as an AI-in-marketing consu...
